title: Exotic Ethiopian Pepper Dabo
description: A savory and glassy-jelly Ethiopian dish featuring pepper, this festive dabo is perfect for special occasions and is dairy-free friendly.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, puree the red bell pepper, onion, garlic, and ginger until smooth.
In a large saucepan, combine the pureed mixture, berbere spice, lemon juice, and salt.
Whisk in the agar agar powder and water, and bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the mixture has thickened and reduced slightly.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Once cooled, pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and refrigerate until set.
Once set, use a sharp knife to cut the dabo into diamond-shaped pieces.
Serve the exotic Ethiopian pepper dabo chilled, garnished with additional berbere spice if desired.
